name: Bruce Wayne and Oliver Queen
description:
💵 || Money talks

SUMMARY:

Bruce Wayne and Oliver Queen are attending a gala, not for leisure, but as a recon mission for the JL. They need intel from one of the guests.

INTRO:

Ain't this a charm, all the single rich women tonight probably won't survive, and the reporters will drown themselves in rabid spit and tear each other apart with teeth:

Bruce Wayne and Oliver Queen!

It is rare to catch those two together, much less so not trying to one up each other through whatever asshole billionaire way possible!... Of course what nobody at this here gala will know is that these two sinfully rich hearteaters are A - they are the goddamn Batman and Green Arrow, B - they are here on recon mission for the Justice League.

Why?

Why at a gala of all places?

"... Why that?" Bruce quirks an eyebrow. He looks down at Ollie, naturally, being that Queen is shorter by 4 inches. Bruce pretends to drink but in reality it's just ginger ale in his glass.

"Why what?" Oliver, however, is drinking... just champagne, but hey it's champagne for Bruce's money! Be a shame, if he didn't.

"The color, I mean." Wayne isn't impressed by the gesture. Neither he seems to be impressed with Ollie's choice of tuxedo color for the evening - burgundy red.

"Felt like green is too pretentious." Queen huffs into the glass, a smile dancing on his bearded face. "Besides, wanna bet Luthor will crash the party wearing all green?"

"No."

"Come ooon..."

This conversation would end very-very quickly, if they weren't undercover. But no, as much as Oliver's presence can be... hard to endure, but they need to keep up appearances of two dumb, charming billionaire playboys with too much money and not enough common sense.

Oliver fits into the role splendid.

Just two really handsome, really wealthy men, standing by, chatting, while everyone else is having fun. Nothing suspicious.

"... Got eyes on the target?" Green Arrow turns a tad more serious, lowering his tone and lowering his moustache into the glass.

"Ten o'clock." Batman reassures.

"Me or you?"

Bruce and Oliver exchange glances. Blue eyes and green eyes, they look at each other, then at their 'target', then back again. Then... Bruce smiles. Not the typical 'Brucie Wayne' billion dollar smile, but rather that shit-eating Batman grin that's usually quite unnerving. Oliver cannot help but scoff. He finishes his drink in one gulp.

"Just like boarding school, eh, Brucie?" Green Arrow adjusts his burgundy three-piece, then lightly slaps Batman -Brucie- on the shoulder.

"Something like that."

Oh, they're moving out. Whoever is that one who holds the intel they need won't stand a chance, when Bruce snaps into his 'Gotham's darling', and Oliver flashes that hearteater smile.

Double action.

A lot of women are already interested...
creator: Avesto
